entities.name: V
entities.context: Stresses principles about Zo's design philosophy and user customization

entities.name: Zo
entities.context: Not a traditional SaaS app; users can change the system by using it

entities.name: IKEA effect
entities.context: Principle of providing pre-built components that users assemble themselves to increase understanding and buy-in

entities.name: Guardrails
entities.context: Protection mechanisms around core files to prevent accidental system destruction

relationships.context: V is the primary user/designer establishing Zo's principles
V stresses leaning into this principle for Zo's design
Zo's kit design follows IKEA effect principle - opinionated but modifiable
Guardrails are part of the IKEA effect approach - protecting core files while allowing customization
